side_effects.description: Hands get puffy/meaty but no tingling or carpal tunnel syndrome

protocol_notes: Regular 6IU HGH use. Observes hand puffiness side effect but no neurological symptoms. Notes that on contest prep the hand swelling should be less noticeable. Reports approximately 50/50 occurrence rate among users. Mentions a buddy/client who experienced hand swelling at just 2IU.
